_comment:
Interactive magnetometer calibration. Single step that invokes the Layer 0 calibrate-compass command and branches on the normalised outcome. Hard failures escalate with the operator action needed to recover (remove magnetic interference vs rotate drone); the catch-all `any` matcher surfaces unhandled outcomes through the audit trace so Stage E's wizard always has a story to tell.
Overall budget is 300s — real compass cal typically takes 2-4 minutes of operator rotation; the cap is generous but well under the 600s parser ceiling.
Auto-retries (timeout / noSession / autopilotBusy) are handled by the catalogue's default retry policy on the dispatch itself, so the matchers below only see the *final* outcome.

then.detail: Compass calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
